    "Non-rated fixture staged for a Class I Division 2 location",
    "Luminaire not marked for the classified area per NEC 501.130(B)",
    "Risk of ignition from hot surfaces or arcing in presence of flammable gases/vapors"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the non-rated fixture immediately from the work area",
    "Procure a fixture listed and labeled for Class I, Division 2 per NEC 501.130(B) and suitable for the gas group and temperature class",
    "Verify the replacement fixture's third-party listing mark corresponds to the hazardous location classification on the area classification drawings"
  ],
  "rationale": "A non-rated fixture in a Class I Division 2 location violates NEC 501.130(B) because any equipment installed must be identified for the location. Use of unrated equipment creates an ignition source and can lead to fire or explosion. The work must not proceed with the observed fixture.",

    "NEC 500.5 (Classification of Locations)",

  ],
